_source: CPIC Guideline for tacrolimus and CYP3A5 (PMID: 25801146, updated 2021)

tacrolimus.Rapid Metabolizer: Increase starting dose 1.5 to 2 times recommended starting dose. Total starting dose should not exceed 0.3 mg/kg/day. Use therapeutic drug monitoring (TDM) to guide dose adjustments.
tacrolimus.Intermediate Metabolizer: Increase starting dose 1.5 to 2 times recommended starting dose. Use TDM to guide dose adjustments. Patients may require higher doses than *3/*3 patients to achieve target trough concentrations.
tacrolimus.Poor Metabolizer: Initiate therapy with standard recommended dose. Use TDM to guide dose adjustments. CYP3A5 poor metabolizers (most Europeans and Asians) require standard dosing.

midazolam.Rapid Metabolizer: Reduced drug exposure expected. Monitor for reduced sedative effect. Higher doses may be required.
midazolam.Intermediate Metabolizer: Moderately reduced drug exposure. Standard dosing with monitoring.
midazolam.Poor Metabolizer: Standard drug exposure. Use recommended starting dose.
